name: md-reader
description: Universal markdown reader with Math/PDF/Office support

scripts.cap:build:android: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.cap:build:ios: npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -archivePath $PWD/build/App.xcarchive archive
